entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `position` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_profile_links_position` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`position`)
